name: Bean and Salsa Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the beans and discard.
2. Place the beans in a food processor and process until almost smooth.
3. Add the hot sauce and lime juice to the bean mixture.
4. Mix well.
5. Spread the bean mixture over the bottom of a large platter.
6. Spoon and spread the sweetened chili sauce over the beans.
7. Sprinkle the green onions evenly over the top.
8. Cover the beans mixture and scallions with the sour cream.
9. Top it with the salsa.
10. Garnish with sprigs of fresh cilantro and serve with tortilla chips.
